name: future-agi
description: Repo-level tooling for Future AGI (hooks + formatters). App code lives in frontend/ and futureagi/.

scripts.contracts:check: scripts/generate-openapi-schema.sh && yarn --cwd frontend contracts:check && git diff --exit-code api_contracts/openapi/swagger.json frontend/src/api/contracts/filter-contract.generated.js frontend/src/api/contracts/api-surface.generated.js frontend/src/api/contracts/openapi-contract.generated.js frontend/src/api/contracts/openapi-client.generated.js
